_comment: Central Lancashire Highways System — under Lancashire County Council. Covers all 12 MARIO districts in a single ETL pass. Blackpool and Blackburn (unitaries) manage their own highways and are NOT in MARIO.

major_projects.name: Burnley Town Centre LUF Programme (Town2Turf + Junctions)
major_projects.description: £19.9M LUF-funded town centre to Turf Moor pedestrian/cycling link. Manchester Rd one-way system, Centenary Way junction rebuild, Hammerton St, Colne Rd/Hebrew Rd junction, Brennand St/Murray St signal installations.
major_projects.reason: LUF grant-funded project with DLUHC milestones — deferral risks losing £19.9M funding

major_projects.name: Padiham Rd Active Travel
major_projects.description: LCC active travel corridor with new signal-controlled crossings and cycle infrastructure.
major_projects.reason: Active Travel Fund grant — deferral risks DfT clawback

named_junctions_seed.name: Manchester Rd / Red Lion St
named_junctions_seed.notes: New one-way system Feb 2026, LUF scheme

named_junctions_seed.name: Colne Rd / Barracks Rd
named_junctions_seed.notes: Major works Jan-Aug 2026, new avg speed cameras

named_junctions_seed.name: M65 J7 Accrington
named_junctions_seed.notes: Main town access, retail park traffic

named_junctions_seed.name: M65 J6 Whitebirk
named_junctions_seed.notes: Retail/industrial park junction, shared with Blackburn

named_junctions_seed.name: A679/A680 Accrington Centre
named_junctions_seed.notes: Town centre bottleneck, Blackburn Rd/Whalley Rd

named_junctions_seed.name: M65 J12 Brierfield
named_junctions_seed.notes: Brierfield access, shared with Burnley boundary

named_junctions_seed.name: A56/M66 Edenfield Junction
named_junctions_seed.notes: M66 terminus, strategic gateway to Manchester

major_projects.name: A683 Caton Road Flood Resilience
major_projects.description: Flood defence-linked highway improvements — drainage, kerb raising, resurfacing. Part of Lancaster flood risk management.
major_projects.reason: DEFRA/EA flood defence grant — deferral risks losing flood resilience funding

named_junctions_seed.name: M6 J34 Lancaster
named_junctions_seed.notes: A683 junction, main city access from M6

named_junctions_seed.name: A6/A586 Galgate
named_junctions_seed.notes: Village bottleneck on A6 south of Lancaster

major_projects.name: Chorley Town Centre Public Realm
major_projects.description: Town Deal funded public realm improvements — Market Street, High Street, paving and access.
major_projects.reason: Towns Fund grant with DLUHC delivery milestones

major_projects.name: A582/B5253 South Ribble Western Corridor
major_projects.description: Dualling of A582 Penwortham Way and B5253 Flensburg Way. Planning approved.
major_projects.reason: LCC City Deal funded — £100M+ programme with contractual milestones

named_junctions_seed.name: M6 J29 / M65 J1 Bamber Bridge
Station Rd / Brownedge Rd Bamber Bridge
named_junctions_seed.notes: Near M6 J29, heavy commuter traffic

schools_seed.name: Leyland St Marys Catholic Technology College

major_projects.name: Preston Western Distributor / East-West Link Road
major_projects.description: Major road scheme linking M55 J2 to A6 north of Preston. Includes new bridge over railway and River Ribble.
major_projects.reason: DfT Housing Infrastructure Fund + LCC capital programme — multi-year construction contract

named_junctions_seed.name: M55 J1 Broughton Roundabout
named_junctions_seed.notes: Lancashire's worst congestion hotspot — M55/A6/B5269 convergence

major_projects.name: A585 Skippool-Windy Harbour Improvement
major_projects.description: National Highways A585 bypass/improvement scheme — dualling, new junctions, bridge works.
major_projects.reason: National Highways RIS2 scheme — fully funded, contractor on site since 2023

schools_seed.name: Lytham St Annes High Technology College

mario.note: Covers 12 Lancashire districts. Blackpool and Blackburn with Darwen (unitaries) are NOT in MARIO — they maintain their own highways.
